overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game, exploring neon-lit indoor industrial corridors and server rooms. The camera moves steadily through purple, teal, and yellow-lit spaces featuring vending machines, graffiti art, server racks, and a seated NPC, showcasing high-fidelity game engine graphics with dynamic lighting.

A vending machine stands on the right while the left wall features colorful graffiti murals. The environment has a cyberpunk aesthetic with metal lockers and concrete flooring.

The space has an industrial office aesthetic with concrete floors and utilitarian furniture.

segments.scene_description: The camera leaves the yellow locker room behind and enters a long corridor bathed in teal light. The space is lined with server racks and industrial equipment, featuring exposed ventilation ducts on the ceiling. The environment maintains the industrial cyberpunk aesthetic with concrete surfaces and ambient neon lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a cyberpunk industrial complex, transitioning from a neon-purple corridor into a series of server rooms and offices with shifting color palettes. It begins by moving through a narrow hallway lined with graffiti murals and a vending machine under deep purple light. As the camera passes through a doorway, the atmosphere shifts to teal ambient lighting among server racks before gradually warming into a yellow-lit room featuring illuminated locker banks. The scene then reveals an NPC working at a computer terminal in an industrial office space before turning away from the yellow glow and entering a final, long corridor. This concluding stretch is bathed in teal light and lined with server racks and exposed ceiling ventilation, returning the environment to a cold, industrial aesthetic.
